subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful! At this moment, when the pen hath grown weary from its ceaseless motion and the fingers have become feeble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء الرحمن در ایندم که قلم از کثرت جولان خسته و انامل ناتوان گشته جناب
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
